config.comments.config.adapter_qqbot.bot: Whether to enable sending URLs when using QQ official robot.
config.comments.config.adapter_qqbot.lim: When using QQ official robot, the response emoji ID attached to the message when message processing fails. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
config.comments.config.adapter_qqbot.pri: Whether it is a private bot when using the QQ official bot.
config.comments.config.adapter_qqbot.typ: When using QQ official robot, the response emoji ID attached to the message when processing the message. For details of emoji ID, see: https://bot.q.qq.com/wiki/develop/api-v2/openapi/emoji/model.html#Emoji
